name: Ocean Breeze Shower Gel
description:
Immerse your senses in the revitalizing essence of the sea with Clove's Ocean Breeze Shower Gel. Formulated to transport you to a serene coastal escape, this luxurious gel features an invigorating fragrance profile that captures the crisp, clean notes of an oceanic morning. Enriched with Vitamin E, it works to nourish and protect your skin's moisture barrier while providing a deep, refreshing cleanse that leaves you feeling awakened and renewed.

The lightweight, foaming texture glides effortlessly across the body, lifting away impurities without stripping your skin of its natural oils. Perfect for your daily ritual, this shower gel transforms your bathroom into a spa-like retreat, leaving your skin feeling impeccably soft, supple, and delicately scented long after you step out of the shower. Experience the ultimate harmony of nature-inspired luxury and effective skincare in one beautiful bottle.

usageTips: Apply a small amount to a damp loofah or sponge for a richer, more luxurious lather.
Massage in circular motions over wet skin, focusing on areas that need extra refreshment.
Rinse thoroughly and follow with a lightweight moisturizer to lock in the ocean-fresh hydration.
keyBenefits: Infused with Vitamin E for superior skin softening
Invigorating fresh scent provides an energizing experience
Gentle formula suitable for daily cleansing and hydration

name: All-in-1 Micellar Water Makeup Cleanser
description:
Experience the ultimate gentle cleansing ritual with Clove's All-in-1 Micellar Water. Infused with natural rose water and soothing aloe vera, this dermatologically tested cleanser effortlessly lifts away makeup, excess sebum, and daily impurities from your face, eyes, and lips without the need for harsh rubbing. The delicate botanical essence of fresh roses elevates your everyday skincare routine into a moment of pure, refreshing self-care.

Designed for ease and efficiency, this no-rinse, alcohol-free formula preserves your skin's natural moisture barrier rather than stripping it. Simply saturate a cotton pad and sweep gently across your skin. Watch as makeup melts away instantly, leaving your face clean, hydrated, and thoroughly refreshed. It is the perfect choice for busy mornings, quick post-workout refreshes, or as the crucial first step in your evening double-cleansing routine.

Formulated with sensitive skin in mind, this nourishing micellar water leaves behind absolutely no greasy residue—just a calm, radiant, and clean complexion. The cooling sensation of aloe vera helps to soothe minor irritation and redness, while rose water naturally tones and balances, prepping your skin beautifully for serums and moisturizers.

name: Stardust Eau de Parfum
description: Embark on a celestial journey with Clove's Stardust Eau de Parfum, a captivating fragrance designed for the modern woman who radiates confidence and charm. Housed in a breathtaking star-shaped glass bottle featuring a dreamy pink-to-purple ombre gradient with subtle shimmering flecks, this perfume is as much a work of art for your vanity as it is an enchanting scent for your skin. It encapsulates the magic of a starry night, wrapping you in an aura of pure wonder and elegance from the very first spray.

name: Aloe Vera Mask
description:
Indulge your skin with the Clove's Aloe Vera Mask, a cooling sanctuary in a jar designed to rescue dull, thirsty, and irritated skin. Infused with pure, soothing aloe vera leaf extract and ultra-hydrating hyaluronic acid, this mask creates an immediate sensation of relief and renewal. It works deep within the skin's surface to restore moisture balance, calm inflammation, and impart a healthy, dewy glow that lasts.

Perfect for all skin types, especially those prone to sensitivity or dryness, this lightweight formula absorbs beautifully to revitalize your complexion. Whether you've spent too long in the sun or your skin simply feels tired and stressed, this mask provides the intensive hydration boost you need to feel refreshed and balanced once again. Incorporate it into your weekly ritual to experience the calming power of nature combined with science-backed moisture retention.

usageTips: Apply a generous layer to clean, dry skin, avoiding the eye area.
Leave on for 10-15 minutes, then gently rinse off with lukewarm water.
For an extra refreshing effect, store the jar in the refrigerator before use.
keyBenefits: Instantly soothes and calms irritated or sun-exposed skin.
Delivers deep, long-lasting hydration with hyaluronic acid.
Revitalizes and refreshes tired-looking complexions.

name: Day Cream for Oily & Combination Skin SPF 15
description:
Experience ultimate balance with Clove's Day Cream for Oily Skin, a sophisticated, lightweight daily moisturizer engineered specifically for oily and combination skin types. Infused with the potent combination of Niacinamide and Green Tea Extract, this advanced formula works tirelessly to control excess sebum production and minimize shine, leaving your face with a beautifully smooth, matte finish that lasts all day.

Beyond oil control, this daily essential provides crucial defense with integrated SPF 15 UVA/UVB protection, shielding your delicate facial skin from harmful environmental aggressors and premature aging. The ultra-light, non-greasy texture absorbs almost instantly, delivering refreshing hydration without clogging pores or feeling heavy.

To use, apply a small amount to clean, dry skin every morning. Gently massage in upward, circular motions over the face and neck until fully absorbed. Perfect as a base under makeup or worn alone for a clean, fresh, and shine-free complexion.

name: Womanizer Men's Eau de Parfum
description:
Unleash your inner charisma with Clove's Womanizer, a captivating men's fragrance designed for the modern gentleman who commands attention. Housed in a sleek, deep charcoal-lacquered glass bottle with a tactile, textured black cap, this Eau de Parfum represents the pinnacle of sophisticated masculinity and effortless elegance.

The scent profile opens with a bold, refreshing burst of citrus blended with sharp exotic spices, leading into a warm, aromatic heart where subtle woody accords take center stage. As the fragrance settles, a rich, seductive base of deep musk and smoky undertones lingers beautifully on the skin, providing a powerful, long-lasting trail that stays memorable all night.

Designed for the confident man, this standard 100ml bottle is perfect for evening wear, formal events, or anytime you want to make a lasting impression. Simply spray onto pulse points, such as your wrists and neck, to let the warmth of your skin amplify this masterfully blended concentration.

name: Day Cream for Dry Skin SPF 15
description:
Clove’s Day Cream for Dry Skin is a luxurious, ultra-hydrating daily moisturizer designed specifically to rescue parched and sensitive skin. Enriched with powerful Hyaluronic Acid and a curated blend of nourishing natural oils, this rich yet fast-absorbing cream melts effortlessly into the skin, instantly restoring lost moisture and establishing a protective barrier against daily environmental stressors.

Formulated as an essential first step in your morning routine, this comforting cream features built-in SPF 15 UVA/UVB protection to guard your delicate complexion from harmful sun exposure. It actively targets severe dryness, flaky patches, and tight sensations, leaving your face feeling incredibly soft, supple, and deeply revitalized without any greasy residue.

Experience a dramatic boost in radiance and comfort from the very first application. By reinforcing your skin's natural lipid barrier, Clove's Day Cream locks in long-lasting hydration, delivering a beautifully plump, healthy-looking glow that keeps your skin protected and pampered all day long.

name: Nourish & Repair Hair Mask
description:
Experience the ultimate hair rejuvenation with Clove's Nourish & Repair Hair Mask. Formulated as a deep conditioning treatment, this luxurious mask is meticulously crafted to restore vitality, strength, and brilliant shine to tired, damaged locks. Enriched with the power-duo of Shea Butter and Argan Oil, it delivers intense nutrition deep into the hair cuticle, smoothing frizz and replenishing essential moisture to dry and brittle strands.

To further enhance its restorative power, this premium mask is infused with Keratin and Panthenol (Pro-Vitamin B5). These high-performance ingredients work in harmony to repair structural damage, reinforce hair elasticity, and create a protective shield against heat styling and environmental stressors. The result is hair that feels remarkably soft, exceptionally healthy, and beautifully manageable after just one use.

For best results, apply a generous amount to clean, damp hair, focusing on the mid-lengths to ends. Leave the rich, creamy formula on for 5 to 10 minutes to allow the nutrients to fully absorb, then rinse thoroughly. Perfect for all hair types, this weekly self-care ritual brings the professional salon experience directly to your home.

name: Coffee & Vitamin E Invigorating Shower Gel
description:
Awaken your senses with the Clove's Coffee Shower Gel, a premium bathing experience designed to transform your morning routine into a spa-like ritual. Infused with the rich, aromatic essence of freshly roasted coffee beans, this indulgent wash gently cleanses while enveloping your skin in a warm, energizing scent that lingers throughout the day. The sophisticated formula is enriched with Vitamin E, known for its powerful antioxidant properties and ability to deeply nourish the skin barrier.

Crafted for those who crave a moment of luxury in their daily shower, this gel lathers into a velvety foam that effortlessly removes impurities without stripping away essential moisture. It leaves your skin feeling incredibly soft, supple, and refreshed. Perfect for all skin types, the infusion of coffee extract helps to stimulate and brighten, while the vitamin-rich formula works to soothe and condition, ensuring your skin remains hydrated and radiant long after you towel off.

usageTips: Apply to a loofah or washcloth to create a rich, dense lather
Massage in circular motions over damp skin, focusing on areas needing extra freshness
Rinse thoroughly with warm water and follow with a moisturizing body lotion for optimal softness
keyBenefits: Energizing coffee aroma for a refreshing morning wake-up call
Vitamin E enriched to nourish and protect skin elasticity
Gently cleanses while maintaining natural moisture balance

name: Citrus Refresh Shower Gel
description:
Awaken your senses with Clove's Citrus Shower Gel, a vibrant and invigorating blend designed to transform your daily shower into a revitalizing spa-like experience. Infused with the bright, sun-drenched essence of premium citrus fruits, this luxurious gel deeply cleanses while surrounding you in an uplifting aromatic embrace. The crisp notes of lemon, zesty lime, and sweet orange work in perfect harmony to clear your mind and energize your spirit.

Formulated with the nourishing power of Vitamin E, this shower gel does more than just clean; it replenishes and protects your skin’s delicate moisture barrier. The rich, silky lather leaves your skin feeling incredibly soft, supple, and refreshed without any stripped or tight sensation. Perfect for an early morning boost or a post-workout recovery, this citrus-infused wash is an essential addition to your daily self-care routine.

usageTips: Apply a generous amount to a loofah or sponge for a richer, more luxurious lather.
Massage in circular motions over damp skin, focusing on areas needing extra freshness.
Rinse thoroughly with warm water and follow with a moisturizer to lock in hydration.
keyBenefits: Invigorating citrus scent to boost energy and mood
Vitamin E enrichment for deep skin nourishment
Gentle formula that cleanses without stripping natural oils

name: Chamomile Liquid Soap
description:
Experience the calming touch of nature with Clove's Chamomile Liquid Soap. Infused with pure chamomile extract and soothing aloe vera, this luxurious hand and body wash is designed to cleanse gently while maintaining your skin's essential moisture balance. The rich, creamy lather lifts away impurities without stripping your skin of its natural oils, leaving your hands feeling soft, refreshed, and delicately pampered.

Formulated for all skin types, this soap is the perfect addition to any bathroom or kitchen sink. The soothing botanical properties of chamomile work in harmony with the hydrating benefits of aloe vera, making it an ideal choice for frequent hand washing or a gentle shower experience. Indulge in a daily cleansing ritual that cares for your skin, leaving it calm, clean, and lightly scented with a tranquil, herbal aroma.

usageTips: Dispense one pump into wet hands and massage into a rich lather.
Rinse thoroughly with warm water for soft, clean skin.
Use as a soothing body wash in the shower for an aromatherapy-inspired experience.
keyBenefits: Gentle botanical formula with chamomile and aloe vera
Non-stripping, moisturizing cleanse for daily use
Calms and soothes sensitive skin

name: Nourishing Shampoo with Argan Oil & Keratin
description:
Transform your daily hair care routine with this ultra-nourishing shampoo, expertly formulated to breathe new life into tired, dull hair. Infused with a potent blend of restorative Argan Oil and structural Keratin, this rich cleanser penetrates deep into the hair fiber to provide essential moisture, mend damage, and fortify strands from root to tip. 

Designed for all hair types, this professional-grade formula is further enhanced with Biotin and Vitamin E, creating a protective shield that promotes long-term strength and resilience. Experience a revitalizing wash that leaves your hair feeling touchably soft, impeccably smooth, and radiating with a brilliant, healthy shine. Free from harsh stripping agents, it effectively cleanses while maintaining your hair's natural hydration balance, making every day a good hair day.

usageTips: Apply a generous amount to wet hair and massage into the scalp until a rich lather forms.
Focus on massaging the roots to remove build-up before rinsing thoroughly.
For best results, follow with a smoothing conditioner or hair mask to seal in moisture.
keyBenefits: Deeply nourishes and moisturizes dry hair strands
Strengthens hair structure from root to tip
Enhances natural shine and smoothness with Biotin and Vitamin E

name: Shampoo for Curly Hair
description:
Revitalize your natural texture with our premium Shampoo for Curly Hair, meticulously formulated to define, nourish, and hydrate every strand. Infused with a rich blend of creamy shea butter and tropical coconut oil, this luxurious cleanser works to restore moisture deep within the hair fiber, ensuring your curls, waves, and coils look vibrant, soft, and bouncy after every wash.

Designed specifically for those who embrace their natural hair journey, our gentle formula eliminates build-up without stripping away essential oils. By taming frizz and enhancing your natural curl pattern, it leaves your hair manageable and shiny. Completely free from sulfates and parabens, this shampoo offers a clean, salon-quality experience in the comfort of your own shower, promoting long-term hair health and definition.

usageTips: Apply to wet hair and massage gently into the scalp, working through to the ends.
Rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water to lock in shine.
Follow with a moisturizing conditioner to maintain optimal hydration.
keyBenefits: Enhances natural curl definition and bounce
Deeply hydrates with shea butter and coconut oil
Reduces frizz for a smooth, manageable finish

name: Sunscreen High Protection SPF 50+
description:
Experience superior sun defense with our High Protection SPF 50+ Sunscreen. Formulated to provide advanced broad-spectrum protection against both UVA and UVB rays, this essential skincare staple ensures your complexion remains shielded from sun damage and premature aging. The lightweight, non-greasy formula absorbs instantly into the skin, making it perfect for daily use under makeup or on its own for a natural, healthy finish.

Enriched with a powerful blend of Niacinamide and Vitamin E, this sunscreen goes beyond simple protection to actively nourish and hydrate your skin. Niacinamide works to refine texture and brighten your appearance, while Vitamin E provides essential antioxidant benefits to help defend against environmental stressors. Designed to be water-resistant and gentle, this formula is suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin, providing comfort and peace of mind throughout your day.

usageTips: Apply generously 15 minutes before sun exposure
Reapply every two hours, especially after swimming or sweating
Use as the final step in your morning skincare routine
keyBenefits: Broad-spectrum UVA/UVB protection
Hydrating formula with Niacinamide and Vitamin E
Lightweight, non-greasy texture suitable for all skin types

name: Mood Ring Eau de Parfum
description:
Indulge in the vibrant and shifting sensory experience of Clove's Mood Ring Eau de Parfum, a exquisite fragrance crafted specifically for the modern woman. Housed in a gorgeous gradient bottle transitioning from sunset pink to deep violet, this perfume mirrors the playful complexity of your inner world. It opens with an uplifting burst of ripe, sun-kissed fruits and subtle citrus notes that evoke instant joy and curiosity.

As the fragrance settles, it blossoms into a luxurious heart of fresh-cut florals, featuring romantic jasmine petals, elegant rose, and a sophisticated touch of powdery iris. This floral core represents grace and effortless charm, evolving beautifully throughout the day. Grounding the experience is a sensual base of sweet vanilla, warm amber, and velvety musk, leaving a lingering, irresistible trail of comforting warmth.

Perfect for both everyday elegance and memorable nights out, this 50ml Eau de Parfum delivers remarkable longevity and moderate sillage. Mist onto your pulse points—wrists, neck, and inner elbows—to let your body's natural warmth unfold the captivating, multi-layered notes of this signature scent.

name: Rose Reed Diffuser
description:
Transform your living space into a blooming sanctuary with the Clove's Rose Reed Diffuser. Infused with the delicate, timeless essence of fresh-cut roses, this elegant home fragrance creates a serene and inviting atmosphere in any room. The sophisticated scent profile captures the authentic beauty of a sun-drenched garden, blending soft floral notes with a touch of greenery to ground the fragrance in natural, airy charm.

Crafted for those who appreciate both aesthetic beauty and long-lasting quality, this 120ml diffuser comes in a premium glass vessel with a gold-tone collar that complements any decor. The high-quality reeds provide a consistent and subtle release of fragrance, ensuring your home remains subtly scented with the romantic aura of roses. Perfect for living rooms, bedrooms, or bathrooms, it offers a continuous olfactory experience that elevates your mood and softens your surroundings.

usageTips: Place in a high-traffic area to help circulate the scent throughout the room
Flip the reeds every week to refresh the fragrance intensity
Keep away from direct sunlight and heat sources to extend the life of the oil
keyBenefits: Provides continuous, flameless fragrance for your home
Sophisticated glass design enhances home decor
Delicate rose scent helps create a calming and romantic environment

name: Rice Peeling Exfoliant
description:
Reveal your most radiant complexion with Clove's Rice Peeling, a sophisticated exfoliating treatment designed to smooth, brighten, and renew the skin's surface. Formulated with potent rice extract and natural exfoliating grains, this gentle yet effective peel sweeps away dull, dead skin cells and impurities, leaving your face feeling velvety soft and remarkably refreshed. 

Inspired by traditional skincare rituals, the creamy texture works to refine skin texture and promote a more even, luminous tone. Perfect for those looking to combat dullness or prep their skin for better absorption of serums and moisturizers, this peeling treatment transforms your routine into a spa-like experience, revealing a clear, healthy-looking glow with every use.

usageTips: Apply to clean, damp skin and massage gently in circular motions
Avoid the delicate eye area
Use 1-2 times per week for optimal radiance
keyBenefits: Gently removes dead skin cells for smoother texture
Brightens and evens out complexion
Promotes skin renewal and cellular turnover

name: Tropical Reed Diffuser
description:
Transform your living space into a serene island sanctuary with the Clove's Tropical Reed Diffuser. This exquisite home fragrance captures the essence of a lush, sun-drenched paradise, blending vibrant exotic fruits with the soft, intoxicating allure of tropical blooms. Designed to elevate your mood, the scent profile features crisp, uplifting top notes that melt into a heart of hibiscus and plumeria, leaving a lingering, warm, and breezy finish that refreshes any room in your home.

Crafted with elegance in mind, this 120ml diffuser is housed in a sleek glass vessel complemented by a sophisticated gold collar and natural rattan reeds. Beyond its captivating scent, the beautiful botanical-adorned packaging makes it a stunning decorative piece for your coffee table, bedside, or vanity. Experience a continuous, effortless release of fragrance that turns your home into a tranquil escape from the everyday.

usageTips: Place the reeds into the glass bottle, allowing them to soak up the fragrance for about an hour, then flip them to saturate the ends.
Flip the reeds every week to refresh the scent throw.
For a stronger fragrance experience, use all provided reeds; use fewer reeds for a more subtle, delicate aroma.
keyBenefits: Provides long-lasting, continuous fragrance without the need for an open flame.
Beautifully designed packaging enhances your home decor.
Creates a calming and invigorating atmosphere perfect for relaxation or entertaining.

name: Lavender Infusion Shower Gel
description:
Transform your daily shower into a tranquil sanctuary with our Lavender Infusion Shower Gel. Crafted to gently cleanse while enveloping your skin in the soothing, timeless aroma of fresh lavender fields, this luxurious gel creates a rich, velvet-like lather that washes away impurities without stripping your skin of its essential moisture. Infused with Vitamin E, a powerful antioxidant, it helps to nourish and protect your skin barrier, leaving it feeling remarkably soft, supple, and delicately scented after every wash.

Designed for those who seek a moment of relaxation in their busy day, the calming floral notes work to ease the mind and prepare you for a restful evening or a serene start to your morning. The elegant, transparent bottle showcases the beautiful purple hue of the gel, making it a sophisticated addition to any bathroom vanity or shower shelf. Indulge in a premium cleansing experience that prioritizes both efficacy and sensory delight.

usageTips: Apply a generous amount to a wet loofah or sponge for an extra luxurious lather
Massage onto damp skin in circular motions to invigorate circulation
Rinse thoroughly with warm water and follow with a matching body lotion for long-lasting fragrance
keyBenefits: Deeply cleanses while maintaining skin's natural moisture balance
Infused with Vitamin E to promote soft, healthy-looking skin
Features a soothing lavender scent perfect for relaxation

name: Curly Hair Styling Cream
description:
Unlock the true potential of your natural texture with Clove's Curly Hair Styling Cream. Expertly formulated for curls, waves, and coils, this luxurious cream acts as the ultimate multi-tasker to define, hydrate, and control your hair without weighing it down. Infused with a potent blend of nutrient-rich Shea Butter and deeply moisturizing Coconut Oil, it provides the essential hydration your strands crave while keeping frizz at bay all day long.

Beyond simple styling, this cream is enriched with Flaxseed and Vitamin E, ingredients renowned for their ability to nourish the scalp and strengthen each hair follicle from within. Whether you are aiming for bouncy, defined ringlets or soft, flowing waves, our non-greasy formula provides a gentle, long-lasting hold that maintains movement and touchable softness. Free from parabens and silicones, this is the clean, effective solution for healthy-looking, vibrant hair that celebrates your natural beauty.

usageTips: Apply evenly to clean, damp hair, working from roots to ends for maximum definition.
Scrunch hair upwards to encourage curl formation and pattern enhancement.
Let hair air dry or use a diffuser for added volume and bounce.
keyBenefits: Deeply hydrates and nourishes with Shea Butter and Coconut Oil
Defines curls and waves while effectively fighting frizz
Provides a soft, long-lasting hold that maintains natural movement

name: Repair & Color Care Shampoo
description:
Revitalize your hair with Clove's Repair & Color Care Shampoo, a premium formula specifically engineered for colored and chemically treated locks. This professional-grade cleanser works to repair damage caused by heat and dyes while fortifying your hair strands from root to tip. Infused with a rich blend of keratin and Moroccan argan oil, it penetrates deeply to nourish and soften, leaving your hair feeling incredibly smooth, manageable, and vibrant.

Designed with an advanced UV filter, this shampoo acts as a protective shield against sun-induced fading, ensuring your salon-quality color stays rich and brilliant for longer. Experience a gentle yet effective cleanse that preserves your hair's natural oils without stripping away your precious color. With regular use, your hair will regain its elasticity, bounce, and healthy-looking shine, transforming dry and dull strands into a lustrous, salon-worthy mane.

usageTips: Apply to wet hair and massage into the scalp to create a rich, gentle lather.
Leave on for 1-2 minutes to allow the keratin and argan oil to penetrate the hair shaft.
Rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water and follow with a color-safe conditioner for best results.
keyBenefits: Protects and preserves hair color vibrancy with UV filters
Deeply repairs and strengthens damaged strands with keratin
Infuses essential moisture and shine with argan oil

name: Olive Oil Liquid Soap
description:
Elevate your daily cleansing ritual with our luxurious Olive Oil Liquid Soap, a sophisticated blend designed to purify while providing deep, lasting hydration. Infused with pure, extra virgin olive oil and soothing aloe vera, this soap creates a rich, velvety lather that gently lifts away impurities without stripping your skin of its essential natural oils. The antioxidant-rich formula works harmoniously to soothe irritation and soften the skin, leaving your hands and body feeling refreshed, supple, and delicately nourished after every wash.

Crafted for those who prioritize both efficacy and gentle care, this liquid soap is perfect for all skin types, including those with sensitive skin. The subtle, clean scent evokes the freshness of an Mediterranean olive grove, turning a simple hand-washing routine or shower into a spa-like experience. Free from harsh chemicals and enriched with natural botanical extracts, it provides the perfect balance of deep cleansing and intensive moisture, ensuring your skin remains healthy, radiant, and perfectly conditioned throughout the day.

usageTips: Apply a small amount to damp hands or a sponge to create a rich lather
Massage gently over skin and rinse thoroughly with warm water
Follow with a matching body lotion to lock in extra hydration
keyBenefits: Deeply moisturizes with extra virgin olive oil
Soothes and calms skin with natural aloe vera
Gentle, non-stripping formula suitable for daily use

name: Sugar Peeling Exfoliating & Smoothing Scrub
description:
Indulge in the ultimate skin-polishing experience with Clove's Sugar Peeling. This luxurious exfoliating scrub is expertly formulated with natural sugar crystals to gently yet effectively buff away dull, dead skin cells, revealing a smoother and more radiant complexion underneath. Designed to renew your skin's texture, this scrub helps to refine skin surface, leaving your body feeling exceptionally soft and polished after every use.

Enriched with a blend of nourishing oils, Clove's Sugar Peeling does more than just exfoliate; it provides deep hydration and replenishment to thirsty skin. As you massage the scrub onto damp skin, the rich oils melt into your pores, leaving a silky, luminous finish without any greasy residue. It is the perfect treatment to revitalize your skin care routine, providing a spa-like experience in the comfort of your own shower. Enjoy the transformation as your skin feels renewed, deeply moisturized, and velvety to the touch.

usageTips: Apply to damp skin in circular motions, focusing on rough areas like elbows and knees
Rinse thoroughly with warm water to reveal soft, moisturized skin
Use 1-2 times per week for optimal results and lasting smoothness
keyBenefits: Gently removes dead skin cells for a radiant glow
Deeply hydrates with nourishing botanical oils
Softens and refines skin texture for a smooth finish

name: Golden Amber & Vanilla Shower Gel
description:
Indulge in the luxurious warmth of Clove's Golden Amber & Vanilla Shower Gel. This sophisticated bath essential is designed to transform your daily routine into a spa-like experience, enveloping your senses in a rich, comforting aroma of velvety vanilla and deep, resinous amber. Crafted for those who appreciate the finer things, this formula not only cleanses your skin but leaves behind a lingering, subtle trail of fragrance that feels both elegant and grounding.

Formulated with nourishing Vitamin E, this shower gel works to gently cleanse while maintaining your skin's natural moisture balance. The lightweight, lathery texture rinses away clean, leaving your skin feeling noticeably softer, smoother, and refreshed. Perfect for all skin types, it is the ultimate treat to soothe your body and mind after a long day, preparing you for a night of rest or a fresh start in the morning.

usageTips: Use with a loofah for maximum lather
Apply to damp skin and massage in circular motions
Rinse thoroughly with warm water
keyBenefits: Infused with Vitamin E for skin nourishment
Deeply hydrating and softening formula
Sophisticated, long-lasting amber and vanilla fragrance

name: Clay Mask
description:
Experience the ultimate skin detox with Clove's Clay Mask, a powerful yet gentle treatment designed to purify and revitalize your complexion. Infused with high-quality Kaolin Clay, this mask acts as a magnet to draw out deep-seated impurities, excess oils, and environmental pollutants from your pores, leaving your skin feeling impeccably clean and balanced.

Enriched with soothing Green Tea extract, this formula provides essential antioxidant protection while calming the skin, ensuring that your detoxification ritual is both effective and non-stripping. The creamy texture glides effortlessly over your face, working to minimize the appearance of pores and refine skin texture, revealing a smoother, softer, and more radiant look after every use. Perfect for all skin types, this mask is the essential weekly reset your skin needs for a healthy, refreshed glow.

usageTips: Apply an even layer to clean, dry skin, avoiding the delicate eye area.
Leave on for 10-15 minutes until the mask is nearly dry, then rinse thoroughly with warm water.
Use 1-2 times per week to maintain a clear, balanced, and revitalized complexion.
keyBenefits: Deeply cleanses pores by drawing out toxins and impurities
Soothes and protects skin with antioxidant-rich green tea extract
Refines texture and minimizes pore appearance for a smoother complexion

name: Nourishing Hair Oil
description:
Revitalize your hair with Clove's Nourishing Hair Oil, a potent blend crafted to breathe life back into tired, dull locks. Infused with a premium combination of Argan Oil, Jojoba Oil, and Vitamin E, this lightweight yet deeply hydrating treatment penetrates the hair shaft to provide essential nutrients, smoothing frizz and sealing in moisture for a radiant, healthy-looking finish. Whether your hair is straight, wavy, or curly, this versatile oil acts as a daily defense against environmental stressors, helping to prevent breakage and split ends while adding a brilliant, silky shine.

Designed for all hair types, this nourishing formula absorbs quickly without leaving a greasy residue. Simply work a few drops through your damp or dry hair to instantly tame flyaways and soften texture. With consistent use, you will notice significantly improved elasticity and manageable, lustrous hair that feels as good as it looks. Elevate your hair care routine with this essential elixir and experience the transformative power of nature's finest oils in every drop.

usageTips: Apply 2-3 drops to damp hair before blow-drying for heat protection and smoothness.
Use as a finishing touch on dry hair to tame flyaways and boost shine.
Apply to the mid-lengths and ends of your hair, avoiding the scalp to prevent oiliness.
keyBenefits: Deeply nourishes and hydrates hair follicles
Strengthens hair to prevent breakage and split ends
Adds a healthy, non-greasy shine to all hair types

name: Topaz Eau de Parfum
description:
Embody pure elegance and warmth with Topaz by Clove's, an exquisite Eau de Parfum designed for the modern woman who radiates confidence. The fragrance opens with a dazzling burst of bright citrus and subtle, warm spices that immediately capture the senses. As it settles, it reveals a rich, velvety floral heart, beautifully balanced with delicate sweet undertones, creating a sophisticated and alluring signature scent.

Crafted to linger beautifully throughout the day and into the evening, this luxurious perfume is best applied to pulse points such as the wrists, neck, and behind the ears. The warmth of your body activates the intricate notes, slowly releasing a captivating aura of golden amber, soft musk, and precious woods that leaves a memorable, sophisticated impression.

Housed in a stunningly faceted glass bottle adorned with a gleaming gold cap, Topaz is as much a visual masterpiece as it is an olfactory one. Perfect for both daily wear and special occasions, it serves as the ultimate expression of feminine grace and timeless luxury.

name: Body Peeling Exfoliating Scrub
description:
Experience the ultimate skin transformation with Clove's Body Peeling, a premium exfoliating scrub meticulously crafted to reveal your most radiant, glowing skin. Enriched with finely milled natural exfoliants, this luxurious formula gently buffs away dead skin cells and everyday impurities, clearing the path for intensive hydration and a healthier-looking complexion.

Infused with a rich blend of nourishing botanical oils, this body peeling treatment doesn't just exfoliate—it deeply conditions and replenishes. As you massage it into damp skin, the warming, comforting aroma of cloves and subtle earthy spices envelops your senses, turning your ordinary shower routine into a relaxing spa-like sanctuary. The unique oil-infused formula melts into the skin, leaving behind no greasy residue, only an ultra-soft, velvety-smooth finish.

Perfect for all skin types, this gentle yet highly effective scrub is the ideal addition to your weekly self-care ritual. Focus on rough, dry areas like elbows, knees, and heels to instantly smooth uneven textures, promote natural skin renewal, and restore your skin's natural, healthy luminescence.
